creative_direction.reasoning: Four-corner peripheral collage of passion-business archetypes around a clean center text/CTA block. The four photos must feel like candid creator moments. Image-gen produces the 4-tile peripheral collage; center block (logo + headline + outline CTA) composites in post.
creative_direction.concept_one_liner: Four passion-business photographs frame a centered 'Turn your passion into your business' headline with soft outline CTA.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 off-white editorial canvas with four photographs floating at the corners (each tilted at slight ±3-5° angles, rounded corners, subtle drop shadow) framing a clean center column containing the Shopify logo, a two-line sentence-case headline, and an outline-style pill CTA button.

camera.style: studio/natural photography for tiles, flat for center

lighting.style: natural daylight for each photo tile, consistent across tiles

color_palette.role: skincare stand beige + warm wood tones in tiles

composition.layout_archetype: peripheral 4-corner collage with centered text block
center_column: Y:32-38%: Shopify shopping bag + wordmark centered
Y:39-48%: two-line sentence-case sans headline 'Turn your passion / into your business'
Y:49-55%: outline-only pill CTA button 'Start for free' (no fill, thin 1.5px black outline)

corner_tiles.content: product flat-lay: two pastel yellow/tan skincare tube/jar bottles on a pink marble stand, clean minimal DTC product shot, pink background inside the tile
overhead close-up of a Black woman in dark apron pouring matcha/liquid into a ceramic cup — hand and apron visible, matcha ceremony vibe, warm wood surface
hand feeding a treat to a golden retriever on a leash, person in blue pants crouching, pet-business/groomer scene
hands whisking matcha in a black bowl with a bamboo whisk, overhead close-up, green matcha foam visible, wood floor beneath

style_directives: each tile has rounded corners (~16px radius) and a very subtle paper-drop shadow
tiles should feel candid / hands-at-work (not product packshots with faces smiling at camera)
photography consistent in natural daylight across tiles

text_elements_in_image.content:
Turn your passion
into your business
text_elements_in_image.font: Shopify Sans Regular or Inter Regular (NOT bold)

negative_prompt: no filled solid-color CTA button (outline only)
no faces smiling directly at camera (hands-at-work framing)
no rigid grid — tiles at natural angles
no photo-blur or heavy filter on tiles

prompt_track_B_background_only.description: Generate off-white canvas + 4 corner photograph tiles. Center logo + headline + CTA composite in post.

nano_banana_json.scene: Vertical 9:16 off-white #F5F5F5 canvas with 4 photographic tiles at the corners (rounded 16px corners, subtle drop shadow, each tilted ±3-5°). Tiles as described in Track A corner_tiles. Center of canvas (approximately x:15-85%, y:30-56%) is empty off-white space reserved for overlaid text and logo.

camera.style: natural daylight photography for tiles, flat for canvas

elements.content:
Turn your passion
into your business

patterns_exemplified: C4 cast the audience (passion archetype variant)
A7 'Turn your X into Y' template
CP-7-adj outline CTA for problem-aware stage
prompt_writer_training_notes: Outline CTA (transparent fill, thin black stroke) is a specific psychological choice for problem-aware — explicitly specify button_fill: transparent AND button_stroke. Default image gen will fill the button. Hands-at-work framing is a deliberate 'no face commitment' move — explicitly say 'hands and body in action, NO faces smiling at camera'. Four-tile peripheral layout needs explicit corner positions and tilt angles or tiles cluster randomly.
